hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$file" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$(basename "$file")" in .env|.env.*|credentials.json|*.pem|*.key|id_rsa*) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify sensitive file: $file" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0
cmd=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); case "$cmd" in *'rm -rf /'*|*'rm -rf ~'*|*'rm -rf .'*|*'rm -rf $HOME'*) echo "BLOCKED: Refusing broad recursive delete: $cmd" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0

cmd=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*) root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); for f in $staged; do case "$f" in *.py) ruff check "$root/$f" 2>&1 || exit 2 ;; *.sh) shellcheck "$root/$f" 2>&1 || exit 2 ;; esac; done ;; esac; exit 0

duration=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_result.duration_ms // 0'); if [ "$duration" -gt 10000 ]; then secs=$((duration / 1000)); osascript -e "display notification \"Command finished (${secs}s)\" with title \"Claude Code\""; fi; exit 0
msg=$(cat | jq -r '.message // "Claude Code needs your attention"'); osascript -e "display notification \"$msg\" with title \"Claude Code\""

echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)"; echo "Recent commits:"; git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null; dirty=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$dirty" ]; then echo "Dirty files:"; echo "$dirty"; fi
cat | jq '{timestamp: now | todate, summary: .summary, files: .file_paths, decisions: .key_decisions}' >> ~/.claude/compaction-log.jsonl 2>/dev/null; exit 0
